title: Latin Patriarch will have access to Jerusalem holy site after police stopped entry
summary_full: The Israeli PM said Cardinal Pierbattista Pizzaballa had been asked not to enter the church out of concern for his safety.
summary_public: The Israeli PM said Cardinal Pierbattista Pizzaballa had been asked not to enter the church out of concern for his safety.
